# .vscode

The `.vscode` directory SHOULD be committed into the repository. It contains shared settings and recommended extensions that enable everyone working on a project to be aligned with project standards.

> [!NOTE]
> Tools like [Kiro] still use the `.vscode` directory to store settings and recommended extensions. These are NOT stored in the `.kiro` directory.

[Kiro]: https://kiro.dev
<!-- @config-manager:end vscode-readme -->
